title: Robust Crisp Mexican Chicken Tacos
description: A spicy and crisp Mexican dish featuring red onions and high-protein chicken, cooked in a bain-marie for a tender and juicy result.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together lime juice, olive oil, and taco seasoning.
Add the chicken to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil over medium-high heat.
Remove the chicken from the marinade and cook until browned on all sides and cooked through.
Transfer the chicken to a bain-marie and cook for an additional 10 minutes.
In a separate pan, heat the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil over medium heat.
Add the sliced red onion to the pan and cook until caramelized and crispy.
Warm the corn tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the tacos by placing the cooked chicken onto a tortilla, followed by a spoonful of caramelized onions, a sprinkle of shredded cheese, and a sprinkle of chopped cilantro.
